series_metadata.series_description: This report contains requests from individuals with diabetes whom want to become a school bus driver. Before consent from ODE, the following medical documentation must be submitted and approved: vital statistics, copy of valid commercial driver license, 3 year driving history (abstract), completed t-8 (3 pages), documentation and approval from Endocrinologist on driver history, medical history, documentation and approval by an Opthamologist, and either the approval or disapproval from ODE. Follow-up documentation for 3 years by Opthamologist and Endocrinologist @ 6 months intervals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for the longevity of the driver's service. ; Electronic: Retain for the longevity of the driver's service., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
